speaker: Draymond Green
prediction_text: Steve Kerr will not return as GSW head coach next season
argument: Farewell felt final: the post-game moment shared with Steph and Steve felt like a goodbye; Surrounding talk: all the discourse circulating about Steve's future pointed toward him not coming back

speaker: Draymond Green
prediction_text: Jimmy Butler will miss a considerable portion of next season, not returning until late February or March at earliest
argument: Injury timeline: Jimmy hurt in January, surgery ~6 weeks later, 12-month recovery puts return around late Feb/March of next season; Ramp-up needed: even after return he'll need time to get comfortable and overcome fear of contact

speaker: Draymond Green
prediction_text: Moses (Moody) will miss a good portion of next season due to injury
argument: Grouped with Butler: Draymond listed Moses alongside Jimmy as players who will probably be out for a good amount of next year when sizing up the Warriors' outlook

speaker: Draymond Green
prediction_text: Draymond Green has approximately 3 more years remaining in his NBA career
argument: Physical condition: finished the season healthy with no significant injuries, body felt great; Motivation: wants minimal time off and sees room to keep improving his game
